usage: add_cell_obs [-help] -cell <cell_name_or_pointer> [-exceptPGNet] -layer <layer_name_or_pointer> [-mask <integer>] [-spacing <float> | -design_rule_width <float>] {-rects {{llx1 lly1 urx1 ury1} {llx2 lly2 urx2 ury2}...}> | -polygon { <x1 y1> <x2 y2> <x3 y3> ...}}

options.name: -cell
options.description: Cell name or pointer, ilm cell also can be supported. ((libCell/ptnCell|topCell|vCell), required)

options.name: -exceptPGNet
options.description: Indicates that Power/Ground routing is ignored when checking for DRC violations (including shorts) involving the added obs. It's equivalent to LEF MACRO OBS LAYER EXCEPTPGNET.

options.name: -rects
options.description: {{llx1 lly1 urx1 ury1} {llx2 lly2 urx2 ury2}...}> obs rect lists
